body.result: Reduced UI defect rate by 38%; 12/12 teams shipped on the unified system.

body.title: Drove design-system migration across 12 product teams
body.situation: Acme had three competing design systems causing inconsistent UX across web.
body.task: Lead a unified design-system migration without freezing product roadmaps.
body.action: Authored RFC, established a 6-week parallel rollout, and paired with each team.
body.result: Reduced UI defect rate by 38%; 12/12 teams shipped on the unified system.
